pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point highlighting main services, offers, and navigation to key tools like Services, Configurator, Gallery, and Locations.
primary_functions: Introduce the shops core offerings (full body color change, full body repaint, custom racing stripes, custom paint).
Provide clear calls-to-action to browse services, start a booking, open the custom paint configurator, or view special offers.
Surface quick access links to find a nearby location and view the gallery.
Reassure users with trust elements such as ratings, warranties, and certifications.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click featured category card 'Full Body Color Change'
Use homepage quick link for 'Custom Racing Stripes'
Click primary CTA 'Build a Custom Paint Job'
Click homepage link to view the gallery
Click homepage link 'Find a Shop Near You'
Click banner or card 'View Special Offers'
Click CTA 'Fleet & Commercial Color Matching'
Click 'Learn more about us' in trust section

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Home'
Clicking site logo returns to homepage

pages.name: Services & Packages
pages.description: Central listing of all service categories and packages with filters and sorting, used to find specific paint and body packages.
primary_functions: Display service categories such as full body color change, full body repaint, custom racing stripes, and other paint services (via categoryId, e.g. services.html?categoryId=full_body_color_change).
Allow users to filter packages by vehicle type (e.g., suv, coupe), price range (min/max), clear coat type (standard_clear_coat, ceramic_clear_coat), and other relevant attributes.
Provide sorting options such as Price: Low to High, Price: High to Low, Rating: High to Low to help find cheapest or best-rated options.
Show a list of packages in each category, each with price, key features, and actions like View Details, Book Now, Add to Cart, and Add to Compare.
Enable search or quick selection for specific services by name, such as locating 'Custom Racing Stripes'.

incoming_params.description: Preselected service category id (e.g., full_body_color_change, full_body_repaint, custom_racing_stripes).
Optional vehicle type filter (e.g., suv, coupe) applied on initial load.
Minimum current_price filter, e.g., 1200 for promo-eligible packages.
Maximum current_price filter, e.g., 2000 to find cheapest options under a budget.
Optional filter for clear coat type (standard_clear_coat or ceramic_clear_coat) when browsing full body repaint packages.
Optional location context to prioritize or filter packages available at a specific shop.
Service keyword search term, e.g., 'custom_racing_stripes'.
Default sort key, e.g., price_asc, price_desc, rating_desc.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Details' on a package card
Click 'Book Now' on a package card
Click 'Compare (X)' toolbar/button after adding packages to comparison
Click contextual link 'Design a custom two-tone paint' from custom paint category

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Services'
Accessed with filters like category, vehicleType, min_price, max_price, sort

pages.name: Package Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific service package, including pricing, warranty, options, and primary booking actions.
primary_functions: Present full details of a selected package (e.g., full body color change for SUV, custom racing stripes, full body repaint) including description, inclusions, compatible vehicle types, and finish options.
Display pricing, any applicable upsells or add-ons, and warranty information to support comparison between standard and ceramic clear coat packages.
Provide primary calls-to-action such as Book Now, Start Booking, or Add to Cart that lead into the booking & checkout flow (booking.html).
Offer secondary actions such as Add to Compare to send the package into the comparison list used on compare.html.
Allow users to Save Configuration or Save to Favorites/Quote for custom paint or configured packages, adding them to the saved items area surfaced on favorites.html.

incoming_params.description: ID of the ServicePackage to display.
Optional PaintConfiguration id to show a specific custom configuration for this package.
Optional vehicle type (e.g., suv, coupe, 2_door_coupe) used as default when adding to cart or booking.
Optional context string indicating originating page for analytics or back-navigation hints (e.g., 'services', 'configurator').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Book Now' or 'Start Booking'
Click 'View Saved Items' after successfully saving a configuration
Click 'View Comparison' after adding this package to comparison list

access_methods.description: Accessed with packageId (and optional configurationId, vehicleType) in query string
Linked from services, configurator, comparison, or offers sections

pages.name: Booking & Checkout
pages.description: Unified booking and checkout summary page where users confirm package details, schedule appointments, enter contact info, and apply promo codes.
primary_functions: Show a summary of the selected package (from package.html), including price, selected options, and location if applicable.

Provide an appointment booking form with fields for vehicle type (e.g., coupe, suv), preferred shop location, date picker, and available time slots (e.g., to select the earliest Saturday morning slot between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM).
Collect required contact details such as name, phone number, email, and appointment type (e.g., Drop-off vs. Wait) before confirming the appointment.
Include a Promo Code / Coupon Code field where users can enter and apply promo codes (e.g., a full body color change promo for packages over 1200) and see the updated pricing.
Provide buttons like Confirm Appointment, Place Booking, and Continue/Next to move to the final confirmation step (booking_confirmation.html).

incoming_params.description: Optional package id for direct booking when not starting from an existing cart.
Optional configuration id if the booking is for a specific custom paint configuration.
Optional preselected vehicle type to initialize the booking form (e.g., suv, coupe).
Optional preselected location id for where the service will be performed.
Optional promo code prefilled into the Promo Code field when coming from a special offer.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Confirm Appointment' / 'Place Booking' and receive a successful response from placeBooking
Click 'Change Location' link in booking form

access_methods.description: Accessed after selecting a package or from cart summary using packageId/configurationId and optional locationId
Booking form submission calls placeBooking and then redirects to booking_confirmation.html

pages.name: Booking Confirmation
pages.description: Confirmation page shown after a booking or appointment is successfully submitted.
primary_functions: Display confirmation details for the booking, including service/package name, location, date, time, vehicle type, and contact information.
Show reference or booking number and any important preparation instructions for the appointment.
Provide links or buttons to print the confirmation, add the appointment to a calendar, or get directions to the selected location.
Offer navigation back to Services, Home, or Locations for further browsing.

incoming_params.description: ID of the booking that was just created and needs to be confirmed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Get Directions' / 'View on Map' from confirmation details
Click 'Back to Home' button
Click 'Book another service' link

access_methods.description: Accessed with bookingId parameter after successful booking
Users can open from confirmation email link containing bookingId

pages.name: Custom Paint Configurator
pages.description: Interactive tool to configure custom paint jobs (including two-tone) and discover matching packages within a budget.
primary_functions: Allow users to select vehicle type (e.g., 2_door_coupe, suv, truck) as the basis for custom paint configuration.
Provide color selection controls for primary and secondary colors (e.g., red as primary and black as secondary) and finish options (e.g., gloss, matte, satin) for each color.
Offer budget controls such as a maximum price field (e.g., set max price to 1800) that filters available configurations and packages.
List compatible paint packages and configurations that match the chosen vehicle, colors, finish, and budget, with sorting options like Price: Low to High.

Enable users to select a configuration card (e.g., the cheapest qualifying two-tone option) to view more details on package.html and then Save Configuration to the users saved items shown on favorites.html.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected vehicle type (e.g., 2_door_coupe) for initial configuration.
Optional hex or color key (e.g., red) for preselecting primary color.
Optional hex or color key (e.g., black) for preselecting secondary color.
Optional finish type for primary color (matte, gloss, satin).
Optional finish type for secondary color (matte, gloss, satin).
Optional maximum budget (e.g., 1800) for initial configuration search.
Optional flag to pre-enable two-tone configuration mode.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a configuration card to view underlying service package details
Click 'View Saved Configurations' after saving a configuration

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Custom Paint'
Accessed with configuration presets such as vehicleType, colors, finishes, and max_price

pages.name: Locations Search
pages.description: Search and browse page for finding shop locations by ZIP code, radius, and rating.
primary_functions: Allow users to search for shop locations by entering a ZIP code (e.g., 90001) and triggering a search.
Provide a distance or radius filter (e.g., 20 miles) that narrows the list of shops around the entered ZIP code.
Offer sorting controls such as Rating: High to Low to identify the highest-rated location within the chosen radius.
Display a list of location cards with key info (name, distance, rating, services) and a link to open full details on location_detail.html.

incoming_params.description: ZIP/postal code to initialize the search, e.g., 90001.
Optional search radius in miles (e.g., 20).
Optional sort key for locations, e.g., rating_desc for Rating: High to Low.
Optional filter to highlight locations offering a specific service category.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a location card in the search results

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Locations'
Can be opened with preset postalCode and radiusMiles for convenience searches

pages.name: Location Detail
pages.description: Detail page for an individual shop location, including business hours, contact info, and map/directions access.
primary_functions: Show full address, phone number, email, and rating for the selected location, along with any location-specific services offered.
Display business hours in a clear section that users can scroll to, as well as notes about peak times or special availability.
Provide a View Map or Get Directions link/button that opens an embedded map or external mapping service for navigation to the shop.
Include secondary calls-to-action such as Book at This Location that routes users back to services.html with the location preselected if desired.

incoming_params.description: ID of the location whose details should be displayed.
Optional context key indicating originating page (e.g., 'locations', 'booking').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all locations' or 'More shops nearby'
Click 'View services at this shop'
Click 'Book at this location' from the location detail page

access_methods.description: Accessed with locationId from the Locations Search or other pages
May be linked from external map or directory listings with locationId

pages.name: Gallery
pages.description: Visual gallery of completed paint jobs and before/after photos with filters and favorite-saving capabilities.
primary_functions: Display a grid of gallery items (photos of past jobs) with thumbnails, brief descriptions, and indicators for finish and color.
Provide filters for finish type (e.g., Matte, Gloss, Satin) so users can select only matte jobs.
Offer color filters (e.g., Black, Gray, Red, Blue) that can be combined to show only black and gray items.
Enable users to click a Favorite or heart icon on individual gallery items to save at least five matte black or gray jobs to their favorites list.
Provide a link or heart icon to open the favorites view on favorites.html after items are saved.

incoming_params.description: Optional finish filter to preselect (e.g., matte, gloss, satin).
Comma-separated list of color keys to filter by (e.g., 'black,gray').
Optional vehicle type filter for gallery items.
Optional service category filter (e.g., custom_racing_stripes) for gallery items.
Optional sort order (e.g., 'recent', 'popular').
Pagination page number for gallery results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Favorites' / heart icon in gallery toolbar after saving items

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Gallery'
Accessed with filter parameters like finish_type and colors

pages.name: Favorites & Saved Items
pages.description: Page listing all user-saved items, including favorited gallery photos and optionally saved package configurations.
primary_functions: Display all favorited gallery items (e.g., five matte black or gray paint jobs) with thumbnails and basic details.
Allow users to scroll through the list of saved items to review what they have previously marked as favorites.
Optionally show a separate section for Saved Configurations or Saved Quotes generated from package.html or configurator.html.
Provide quick links or actions from each saved item (e.g., View Larger, View Details, or Start Booking) to return to relevant detail pages.

incoming_params.description: Optional tab to focus view (e.g., 'gallery' or 'configurations').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Gallery' from favorites page
Click 'Reconfigure' on a saved paint configuration

access_methods.description: Accessed via heart/favorites icon in header or gallery toolbar

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact page with a form for general inquiries and specialized topics such as fleet and commercial services.
primary_functions: Present a contact form with an inquiry type dropdown that includes options like Fleet & Commercial or Business Services for fleet requests.
Provide input fields for name, email, phone number, and preferred contact method (e.g., Phone or Email).
Include a message text area that supports detailed inquiries (e.g., a 50+ character request for custom color-matching for a fleet of more than 5 vehicles).
Allow users to submit the form via a Send Message or Submit button and show a simple success state or confirmation message.
Display additional contact details such as main phone number, email address, and possibly a link to locations.html.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected inquiry type (e.g., fleet_commercial, business_services, general).
Optional short subject line to display above the message field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Find a shop near you' from the contact page

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Contact'
Submitting the contact form stays on this page and shows a success message

pages.name: Special Offers
pages.description: Listing of current deals, coupons, and promo codes for various paint and body services.
primary_functions: Display a list of promotions with titles, descriptions, eligibility criteria (e.g., valid on full body color change services over 1200), and promo code text.
Highlight specific offers for key services like Full Body Color Change so users can easily find relevant codes to use at checkout.
Provide actions such as Copy Code or View Eligible Services that route users to services.html (optionally with a categoryId like full_body_color_change).
Clarify terms and restrictions of each offer, such as minimum spend, included services, and expiration dates.

incoming_params.description: Optional service category filter to show offers relevant to a specific service type.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Eligible Services' for an offer
Click 'Book with this offer' on an offer tied to a specific package

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Special Offers'
Can be pre-filtered by serviceCategory from other pages

pages.name: Package Comparison
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison page for selected service packages, focused on attributes like clear coat type and warranty.
primary_functions: Display up to several selected packages (added from services.html or package.html) in a comparison table with rows for price, clear coat type, warranty duration, and key features.
Allow users to visually compare standard clear coat vs. ceramic clear coat full body repaint packages.
Enable users to identify the package with the longest warranty duration directly within the comparison view.
Provide Select Package or View Details buttons for each compared package that link back to the respective package detail (package.html?packageId=...).

incoming_params.description: Optional package id to visually highlight in the comparison view.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Details' for a package in the comparison table
Click 'Select Package' and proceed directly to booking after optionally adding to cart

access_methods.description: Accessed from 'Compare' button in services or package pages
Optional highlight_package_id parameter can be used for focus

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page providing background on the company, expertise, and approach to custom paint work.
primary_functions: Describe the companys history, mission, and experience in auto body and custom paint services.
Highlight qualifications, certifications, and specialties such as color matching, two-tone designs, and ceramic coatings.
Showcase trust-building information like years in business, customer ratings, and warranty policies.
Provide navigation links back to core functional pages such as Services, Locations, and Contact.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View our services' link
Click 'Find a location' link
Click 'Contact us' link

access_methods.description: Footer navigation entry 'About'
Linked from trust elements on homepage

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Frequently asked questions about services, processes, warranties, and bookings.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about full body repaints, full body color changes, custom racing stripes, and custom paint configurations.
Explain differences between standard clear coat and ceramic clear coat, including typical warranty lengths and benefits.
Provide guidance on booking process, preparation for appointments, typical timelines, and pricing factors.
Offer links from answers to relevant pages like services.html, package.html, and contact.html for further action.

incoming_params.description: Optional FAQ category filter (e.g., 'services', 'warranty', 'booking').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click link within an answer about specific services
Click link within an answer about a particular package
Click 'Still have questions? Contact us' link

access_methods.description: Footer navigation entry 'FAQ'

pages.name: Terms of Service
pages.description: Legal terms governing the use of the website and the provision of services.
primary_functions: Present detailed terms and conditions related to bookings, cancellations, warranties, and service limitations.
Define user responsibilities and acceptable use of the site and its content.
Explain liability limitations and dispute resolution policies.
Provide references or links back to contact.html for questions about terms.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click link 'Questions about these terms? Contact us'

access_methods.description: Footer navigation entry 'Terms of Service'

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Policy explaining how user data and contact information are collected, stored, and used.
primary_functions: Describe what personal information is collected via forms (e.g., name, email, phone) and during booking.
Explain how data is used for communications, bookings, and marketing, and how users can manage preferences.
Outline data retention, security practices, and third-party service usage (e.g., maps, analytics).
Provide contact details or a link to contact.html for privacy-related requests.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us about privacy' link

access_methods.description: Footer navigation entry 'Privacy Policy'

header_links.description: Browse all paint and body services and packages
Configure custom paint and two-tone packages
View paint job photos and before/after examples
View current deals and promo codes
Contact form and business contact information

footer_links.description: About the company and its services
List of auto body and custom paint services
Build and price a custom paint package
Before & after photos of completed work
Find a shop location by ZIP code
Contact form for general and fleet inquiries
How user data and privacy are handled
